observations: A mature, heavily muscled bald man plants his feet wide while thrusting an enormously enlarged viewer-left forearm and armored fist horizontally across his body toward the viewer.
The transformed arm is pale, swollen, deeply ridged, and bound under multiple dark straps and segmented knuckle plates, making bodily deformation and imposed reinforcement directly visible.

Dense tattoo-like or scar-like markings cover the scalp, face, normal arm, and exposed transformed flesh; dark layered shoulder wraps, loose trousers, and reinforced boots frame the pale arm as the focal weapon.
The torso twists behind the fist, the normal hand stays clenched, and the broad stance supports a close-range impact action.
defects: The transformed arm contains dense repeated ridges, straps, rivets, plates, markings, and folds at similar scale, making its internal construction difficult to parse quickly.
The extreme foreground fist hides much of the torso and the arm-to-shoulder transition, limiting clarity about the full deformation.
Most clothing and background values are dark, so the body outside the pale arm separates weakly.
uncertainties: The image does not resolve whether the enlarged arm is permanent anatomy, active transformation, grafted material, or armor grown over flesh.

observations: Three silhouettes retain the same very broad humanoid body while varying the transformed arm into a huge blocky fist held forward, a long conical drill-like forearm used in a charge, and a compact rounded layered fist held beside an upright walk.
The left candidate most closely resembles the master's large armored knuckle block and wide grounded stance, although the master's fist crosses the torso more horizontally.
The three arm shapes produce distinct outer contours and imply impact, piercing, and compact carrying behaviors.
defects: The alternatives keep nearly the same bald heavy humanoid body and change primarily the oversized limb and locomotion pose.
In every candidate the transformed arm dominates the outer silhouette enough that head, torso, and normal arm contribute limited secondary identity.
uncertainties: The alternatives are not lettered or marked as selected; selection is inferred from resemblance to the master.

observations: The crop shows direct eye contact beneath compressed brows, one eye slightly more narrowed, a raised upper lip, visible teeth, a loaded jaw, and a slight forward head turn.
The expression combines confrontation with a small uneven grin, suggesting challenge, confidence, or enjoyment of impending force rather than pain from the transformed arm.
Scalp and facial markings continue into the neck while the enormous pale arm blocks the lower frame, binding the face to the physical threat.
defects: The teeth-bearing half-grin can read as a familiar tough-bruiser expression without specifying a more individual want or fear.
The transformed arm obscures body posture below the shoulders, so face-and-body agreement depends mainly on the visible twist and brow tension.
uncertainties: Unaided inspection cannot distinguish whether the expression is intimidation, pain-masking bravado, anger, or anticipation.

observations: At native size the broad planted body, bald head, massive pale horizontal forearm, and large armored fist remain immediately distinguishable.
The pale transformed arm supplies the dominant contrast against dark clothing and background, preserving a heavy melee-bruiser read.
Facial expression, tattoos, flesh ridges, straps, rivets, garment layers, and individual knuckle plates collapse below reliable recognition.
defects: The fist and forearm merge into one light block, obscuring the exact hand anatomy and reinforcement logic.
The dark legs and shoulder wraps lose separation from the background, leaving the transformed arm to carry most of the identity.
uncertainties: The thumbnail communicates impact strength but not the bodily cost or source of the arm transformation.
